name: clawness
description: A Claude Code plugin that puts the right coding rules in context on every prompt, automatically. 114 rules across 18 domains, per-prompt rule injection (BM25 + TF-IDF + concept expansion, optional model2vec embeddings), Bash-output compression, adversarial review sub-agents, slash commands, and a default-on (opt-out) plan-approval gate. No Docker, no services. Requires Python 3.10+ on PATH; on first session a background hook installs its Python deps (PyYAML, plus optional model2vec) into your environment.

hooks.command: for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/ensure_deps.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/git_check.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/claude_hook.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/compress_output.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/plan_gate.py"; done
for p in python3 python py; do command -v "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1 && exec "$p" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/plan_gate.py"; done
